name: Panthenol
description: Pro-vitamin B5 that attracts and holds moisture while soothing the skin.
scientificSummary: The alcohol analog of pantothenic acid (vitamin B5), it is converted to vitamin B5 in the skin and acts as both a humectant and an emollient.
mechanismOfAction: Binds to water and deeply hydrates the stratum corneum, while also promoting fibroblast proliferation for wound healing.

seo.title: Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5) - Hydration & Healing | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Panthenol moisturizes and calms irritated skin for a healthier barrier.
